title: Emergency Escalation Paths and Contacts
checks: Verify first responder is ICT Operations Staff (24/7 availability)
recommended_actions: Administrative boundaries: First Responder: ICT Operations Staff (24/7)
Administrative boundaries: Technical Escalation: System-specific support teams
Administrative boundaries: Management Escalation: Department Heads and Head ICT
Administrative boundaries: Business Escalation: Executive Management
Administrative boundaries: External Escalation: Vendors and Regulatory Bodies
Critical Systems escalation (Banking Core, Payments): Immediate: First responder action
Critical Systems escalation: 15 minutes: Technical team engagement
Critical Systems escalation: 30 minutes: Management notification
Critical Systems escalation: 60 minutes: Business impact assessment
Critical Systems escalation: 120 minutes: Executive notification
Important Systems escalation (Channels, Interfaces): 15 minutes: First responder action
Important Systems escalation: 30 minutes: Technical team engagement
Important Systems escalation: 60 minutes: Management notification
Important Systems escalation: 120 minutes: Business impact assessment
Support Systems escalation (Reporting, Administration): 60 minutes: First responder action
Support Systems escalation: 120 minutes: Technical team engagement
Support Systems escalation: 4 hours: Management notification
Support Systems escalation: 8 hours: Business impact assessment
Internal technical teams: IDC Support Team for core banking issues
Internal technical teams: Card Operations for Postilion and card transactions
Internal technical teams: Digital Banking for Mobile, Internet banking, E-Wallet
Internal technical teams: Treasury Systems for RTGS, Perago, Treasury modules
Internal technical teams: Database Administration for Oracle, SQL Server
Internal technical teams: Network Team for connectivity and infrastructure
Management contacts: ICT Operations Manager (24/7 availability)
Management contacts: Head of Digital Banking for channel issues
Management contacts: Treasury Manager for payment system issues
Management contacts: Head ICT for all critical incidents
Management contacts: Chief Operations Officer for business impact incidents
External contacts: IDC Vendor Support (Intellect Design Arena)
External contacts: Postilion Support (ACI Worldwide)
External contacts: RBZ NPSD: npsd@rbz.co.zw (CSD RTGS)
External contacts: ZimSwitch technical support
External contacts: Internet Service Providers for connectivity issues
External contacts: Hardware Vendors for server and storage issues
Initial notification: System alert or manual detection
Initial notification: Immediate impact assessment
Initial notification: Notify first responder team
Initial notification: Initial troubleshooting
Ongoing updates: 15 minute updates for critical incidents
Ongoing updates: Hourly updates for major incidents
Ongoing updates: Shift handover with status
Ongoing updates: Management briefings as required
Resolution communication: Root cause identification
Resolution communication: Resolution timeframe
Resolution communication: Workaround availability
Resolution communication: Final resolution confirmation
Resolution communication: Post incident review schedule
Automatic escalation triggers: System downtime over 15 minutes for critical systems
Automatic escalation triggers: Transaction failure rate over 5 percent
Automatic escalation triggers: Security breach detected
Automatic escalation triggers: Data corruption or loss
Automatic escalation triggers: Multiple system failures
Manual escalation triggers: Business process disruption
Manual escalation triggers: Regulatory reporting impact
Manual escalation triggers: Significant customer impact
Manual escalation triggers: Media or public attention
Manual escalation triggers: Management request
Business impact assessment criteria: Number of customers affected
Business impact assessment criteria: Financial transaction impact
Business impact assessment criteria: Regulatory compliance impact
Business impact assessment criteria: Reputation risk
Business impact assessment criteria: Recovery time requirements
Impact level Critical: Core banking unavailable, major payment system down
Impact level High: Multiple channels down, significant customer impact
Impact level Medium: Single channel down, moderate customer impact
Impact level Low: Minor system issues, minimal customer impact
Post incident requirements: Root cause analysis report
Post incident requirements: Corrective action plan
Post incident requirements: Process improvement recommendations
Post incident requirements: Documentation updates
Post incident requirements: Training requirements identification
notes: Contact information must be regularly updated
Incident log requirements: Detection time and method, initial impact assessment, actions taken and times, escalations made, resolution time and method, business impact summary
Communication records: All notifications sent, responses received, meeting minutes, decision records, handover documentation
Compliance requirements: Regulatory reporting for major incidents, audit trail of all actions, management notification protocols, business continuity plan activation, disaster recovery procedures
